description: Fetch hot-ranked posts from a Jike topic/circle. Searches for topics by default, then returns posts from the topic's selected/hot tab sorted by engagement. Each result includes content, author info, interaction counts (likes/comments/reposts/shares), and topic metadata. Requires browser login state.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search keyword to find relevant topics (e.g., "AI", "product"). Ignored if topic_id is provided.

parameters.name: topic_id
parameters.description: Explicit topic/circle ID. When provided, skips keyword search and fetches hot posts directly from this topic.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of hot posts to return.
